name: Hinduism
description: Sanatana Dharma scriptures including Vedas, Upanishads, Bhagavad Gita, Ramayana, Mahabharata, Puranas, Agamas, and Tantras.

name: Buddhism
description: Theravada, Mahayana, and Vajrayana canons including Tripitaka, Dhammapada, and Heart Sutra.

name: Jainism
description: Agamas, Siddhantas, Tattvartha Sutra, and Dravyasamgraha.

name: Sikhism
description: Guru Granth Sahib, Dasam Granth, and Bhai Gurdas Vaaran.

name: Christianity
description: Old Testament, New Testament, Deuterocanon, and Early Church Fathers.

name: Islam
description: Quran, Sahih Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, and Hadith collections.

name: Judaism
description: Tanakh (Torah, Nevi'im, Ketuvim), Mishnah, Talmud, and Midrash.

name: Zoroastrianism
description: Avesta, Gathas, Yasna, and Vendidad.

name: Baháʼí Faith
description: Kitáb-i-Aqdas, Kitáb-i-Íqán, and Hidden Words.

name: Taoism
description: Tao Te Ching, Zhuangzi, and Daozang.

name: Confucianism
description: Four Books and Five Classics including Analects and Mencius.

name: Shinto
description: Kojiki, Nihon Shoki, and Engishiki.

name: Ancient Egyptian Religion
description: Book of the Dead, Pyramid Texts, and Coffin Texts.

name: Greek Religion & Philosophy
description: Homeric Hymns, Hesiod's Theogony, Orphic Hymns, and Platonic Dialogues.

name: Roman Religion
description: Ovid's Fasti, Cicero's De Natura Deorum, and Virgil's Aeneid.

name: Norse Religion
description: Poetic Edda and Prose Edda.

name: Chinese Folk Religion
description: Traditional myths, Shan Hai Jing, and regional folk texts.

name: African Traditional Religions
description: Yoruba Odu Ifa corpus and traditional oral liturgical texts.

name: Indigenous Traditions
description: Popol Vuh, Native American sacred narratives, and Dreamtime stories.

name: Other Traditions
description: Hermeticism, Gnosticism, Nag Hammadi, and Dead Sea Scrolls.
